requirement_topic.en: NEMA MG-1 Frame Dimensions — physical mounting interface for industrial motors
requirement_topic.zh: NEMA MG-1机座尺寸——工业电机物理安装接口标准
requirement_topic.zht: NEMA MG-1機座尺寸——工業電機物理安裝接口標準

summary.en: NEMA MG-1 (Motors and Generators) defines imperial-unit frame sizes (e.g. 56, 143T, 145T, 182T ... 449T and above) governing shaft height, bolt-circle, shaft diameter, keyway, and overall envelope. US buyers and OEMs specify motors by NEMA frame number; mounting holes, shaft centres, and coupled-equipment interfaces are all designed around these dimensions. Compliance with NEMA MG-1 frame tables is a de-facto purchase prerequisite in the North American market.
summary.zh: NEMA MG-1（电机与发电机）以英制单位定义机座尺寸（如56、143T、145T、182T……449T及以上），规定轴高、螺栓圆、轴径、键槽及整体外廓。美国买家和OEM按NEMA机座号选型，安装孔、轴心及配套设备接口均以此为设计基准。符合NEMA MG-1机座表格是北美市场的事实采购前提。
summary.zht: NEMA MG-1（電機與發電機）以英制單位定義機座尺寸（如56、143T、145T、182T……449T及以上），規定軸高、螺栓圓、軸徑、鍵槽及整體外廓。美國買家和OEM按NEMA機座號選型，安裝孔、軸心及配套設備接口均以此為設計基準。符合NEMA MG-1機座表格是北美市場的事實採購前提。

standards_or_laws: NEMA MG-1 (current edition) — Motors and Generators, published by the National Electrical Manufacturers Association

summary.en: Chinese motors are designed to IEC 60034-7 frame designations (e.g. IEC 63, 71, 80, 90, 100 ... 355) using metric dimensions, governed domestically by GB 755 (Rotating Electrical Machines — Rating and Performance) and JB/T 9616 series for frame dimensions. IEC and NEMA frame numbers are wholly incompatible: shaft heights, bolt patterns, and shaft diameters do not correspond, so an IEC-framed Chinese motor cannot be bolted into a NEMA mounting without an adapter or re-engineering.
summary.zh: 中国电机按IEC 60034-7机座代号（如IEC 63、71、80、90、100……355）设计，采用公制尺寸，国内依据GB 755（旋转电机定额和性能）及JB/T 9616系列机座尺寸标准。IEC与NEMA机座号完全不兼容：轴高、螺栓排布及轴径均不对应，中国IEC机座电机无法直接安装于NEMA安装座，须使用转接件或重新设计。
summary.zht: 中國電機按IEC 60034-7機座代號（如IEC 63、71、80、90、100……355）設計，採用公制尺寸，國內依據GB 755（旋轉電機定額和性能）及JB/T 9616系列機座尺寸標準。IEC與NEMA機座號完全不相容：軸高、螺栓排布及軸徑均不對應，中國IEC機座電機無法直接安裝於NEMA安裝座，須使用轉接件或重新設計。

standards_or_laws: GB 755 — Rotating Electrical Machines: Rating and Performance (China national standard, aligned to IEC 60034-1)
IEC 60034-7 — Rotating Electrical Machines: Classification of Types of Construction, Mounting Arrangements and Terminal Box Position
JB/T 9616 — [UNVERIFIED] Frame dimensions series for small and medium three-phase asynchronous motors (Chinese machinery industry standard)

gap.en: Critical physical incompatibility: NEMA MG-1 uses imperial-based frame numbering (NEMA 56 through 449T+) with shaft heights and bolt patterns in inches; Chinese motors use IEC metric frames. The two systems share no common mounting dimensions. A Chinese-manufactured IEC-frame motor exported to the US must either be redesigned to a NEMA frame, supplied with a frame adapter, or explicitly accepted by the buyer as a non-standard fit — all of which add cost and qualification time. This is the primary interface barrier for Chinese motor exports to North America.
gap.zh: 关键物理不兼容：NEMA MG-1采用以英制为基础的机座编号（NEMA 56至449T+），轴高和螺栓排布以英寸为单位；中国电机采用IEC公制机座。两套体系无公共安装尺寸。出口美国的中国IEC机座电机须重新设计为NEMA机座、配套转接架，或由买家明确接受非标安装——以上各项均增加成本和认证周期，是中国电机出口北美的主要接口壁垒。
gap.zht: 關鍵物理不相容：NEMA MG-1採用以英制為基礎的機座編號（NEMA 56至449T+），軸高和螺栓排布以英寸為單位；中國電機採用IEC公制機座。兩套體系無公共安裝尺寸。出口美國的中國IEC機座電機須重新設計為NEMA機座、配套轉接架，或由買家明確接受非標安裝——以上各項均增加成本和認證周期，是中國電機出口北美的主要接口壁垒。

mandatory_status.target: De-facto mandatory — not a federal regulation but universally required by US OEMs, distributors, and end-users as the market-standard specification for motor procurement
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable as a requirement within China — Chinese market uses IEC/GB frames; NEMA compliance only arises on export

compliance_verdict.en: Non-compliant by default. A standard Chinese IEC-frame motor does not meet NEMA MG-1 frame dimension requirements and cannot be directly installed in NEMA-designed equipment. Achieving compliance requires manufacturing or sourcing a NEMA-frame variant, which represents a significant redesign effort for most Chinese motor producers.
compliance_verdict.zh: 默认不合规。标准中国IEC机座电机不满足NEMA MG-1机座尺寸要求，无法直接安装于NEMA设计的设备。达到合规须制造或采购NEMA机座变体，对大多数中国电机生产商而言需要大幅重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: 預設不合規。標準中國IEC機座電機不符合NEMA MG-1機座尺寸要求，無法直接安裝於NEMA設計的設備。達到合規須製造或採購NEMA機座變體，對大多數中國電機生產商而言需要大幅重新設計。

requirement_topic.en: NEMA MG-1 Performance and Marking Requirements — efficiency, temperature rise, service factor, nameplate
requirement_topic.zh: NEMA MG-1性能与铭牌要求——效率、温升、服务系数及铭牌标识
requirement_topic.zht: NEMA MG-1性能與銘牌要求——效率、溫升、服務係數及銘牌標識

summary.en: Beyond dimensions, NEMA MG-1 specifies performance requirements including: efficiency levels (Part 12, aligned with DOE 10 CFR Part 431 EISA/EISA 2007 premium-efficiency mandates for general-purpose motors 1–500 hp), temperature-rise limits by insulation class, service factor (typically 1.15 for general-purpose), locked-rotor torque/current, breakdown torque, and mandatory nameplate data (hp, voltage, full-load amps, rpm, frame, duty, efficiency, power factor, etc.). US buyers treat NEMA MG-1 nameplate conventions as the reference language for procurement and maintenance.
summary.zh: 除尺寸外，NEMA MG-1还规定性能要求，包括：效率等级（第12部分，与DOE 10 CFR Part 431 EISA/EISA 2007高效电机强制要求对齐，适用于1–500马力通用电机）、按绝缘等级划分的温升限值、服务系数（通用型通常为1.15）、堵转转矩/电流、击穿转矩，以及铭牌必填数据（马力、电压、满载电流、转速、机座、工作制、效率、功率因数等）。美国买家将NEMA MG-1铭牌惯例视为采购和维护的参考语言。
summary.zht: 除尺寸外，NEMA MG-1還規定性能要求，包括：效率等級（第12部分，與DOE 10 CFR Part 431 EISA/EISA 2007高效電機強制要求對齊，適用於1–500馬力通用電機）、按絕緣等級劃分的溫升限值、服務係數（通用型通常為1.15）、堵轉轉矩/電流、擊穿轉矩，以及銘牌必填數據（馬力、電壓、滿載電流、轉速、機座、工作制、效率、功率因數等）。美國買家將NEMA MG-1銘牌慣例視為採購和維護的參考語言。

standards_or_laws: NEMA MG-1 (current edition), Part 12 — Efficiency and Part 7 — Nameplate Markings
DOE 10 CFR Part 431 — Energy Efficiency Program: Energy Conservation Standards for Electric Motors (US federal regulation enforcing EISA 2007 premium-efficiency floors)

summary.en: China uses GB 18613 (Energy Efficiency Limits and Energy Efficiency Grades for Small and Medium Three-Phase Asynchronous Motors) for efficiency tiers (IE3/IE4 aligned), and GB 755 / IEC 60034-1 for performance and temperature-rise limits. Nameplate conventions follow GB/T 4942 and IEC 60034-1, using kW (not hp), metric units, and IEC insulation class designations. Service factor is not a standard Chinese nameplate field — Chinese motors are typically rated at 1.0 service factor. These differences mean Chinese motor datasheets and nameplates are not directly readable against NEMA MG-1 procurement specs without translation and unit conversion.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 18613（小型和中型三相异步电动机能效限定值及能效等级）规定效率等级（对应IE3/IE4），GB 755/IEC 60034-1规定性能及温升限值。铭牌惯例遵循GB/T 4942及IEC 60034-1，使用千瓦（而非马力）、公制单位及IEC绝缘等级代号。服务系数不是中国标准铭牌字段，中国电机通常按1.0服务系数额定。上述差异导致中国电机数据表和铭牌无法直接对应NEMA MG-1采购规格，需进行转换和单位换算。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 18613（小型和中型三相異步電動機能效限定值及能效等級）規定效率等級（對應IE3/IE4），GB 755/IEC 60034-1規定性能及溫升限值。銘牌慣例遵循GB/T 4942及IEC 60034-1，使用千瓦（而非馬力）、公制單位及IEC絕緣等級代號。服務係數不是中國標準銘牌欄位，中國電機通常按1.0服務係數額定。上述差異導致中國電機數據表和銘牌無法直接對應NEMA MG-1採購規格，需進行轉換和單位換算。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613 — Energy Efficiency Limits and Energy Efficiency Grades for Small and Medium Three-Phase Asynchronous Motors
GB 755 — Rotating Electrical Machines: Rating and Performance
GB/T 4942 — [UNVERIFIED] Degrees of Protection Provided by the Integral Design of Rotating Electrical Machines (IP Code) — also governs nameplate requirements in some editions
IEC 60034-1 — Rotating Electrical Machines: Rating and Performance (adopted as Chinese standard basis)

gap.en: Multiple compounding gaps: (1) Unit system — Chinese motors are rated in kW; US buyers specify hp; 1 hp = 0.7457 kW so standard power steps do not align exactly. (2) Service factor — Chinese motors are typically rated SF=1.0; US general-purpose motors are commonly SF=1.15, meaning the US motor can sustain 15% overload continuously. (3) Efficiency rating method — both use IEC IE-class levels but DOE 10 CFR Part 431 enforces specific numerical floors by hp and pole count that must be independently tested and certified; Chinese GB 18613 floors may not match at all hp/pole combinations. (4) Nameplate language and fields — a NEMA-spec nameplate requires fields (frame designation, service factor, nominal efficiency, design letter) absent from Chinese standard nameplates, requiring supplementary labelling for US market entry.
gap.zh: 多重叠加差距：(1) 单位制——中国电机以千瓦额定，美国买家以马力规格，1马力=0.7457千瓦，标准功率档不完全对应。(2) 服务系数——中国电机通常SF=1.0，美国通用型电机普遍SF=1.15，即美国电机可持续承受15%过载。(3) 效率认证方法——两者均使用IEC IE等级，但DOE 10 CFR Part 431按马力和极数强制规定具体数值下限，须独立测试认证；中国GB 18613下限在部分马力/极数组合上可能不符。(4) 铭牌语言和字段——NEMA规格铭牌须有中国标准铭牌所缺的字段（机座代号、服务系数、额定效率、设计字母），进入美国市场须补充标识。
gap.zht: 多重疊加差距：(1) 單位制——中國電機以千瓦額定，美國買家以馬力規格，1馬力=0.7457千瓦，標準功率檔不完全對應。(2) 服務係數——中國電機通常SF=1.0，美國通用型電機普遍SF=1.15，即美國電機可持續承受15%過載。(3) 效率認證方法——兩者均使用IEC IE等級，但DOE 10 CFR Part 431按馬力和極數強制規定具體數值下限，須獨立測試認證；中國GB 18613下限在部分馬力/極數組合上可能不符。(4) 銘牌語言和欄位——NEMA規格銘牌須有中國標準銘牌所缺的欄位（機座代號、服務係數、額定效率、設計字母），進入美國市場須補充標識。

mandatory_status.target: Partially mandatory — NEMA MG-1 itself is a voluntary standard, but DOE 10 CFR Part 431 efficiency floors are US federal law (mandatory) for covered motor types; NEMA MG-1 nameplate and performance conventions are de-facto mandatory for market acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable as an export requirement within China — GB 18613 efficiency compliance is mandatory for Chinese domestic market; NEMA/DOE compliance only required for US export

compliance_verdict.en: Partially compliant at best without additional steps. A Chinese motor meeting GB 18613 IE3/IE4 efficiency levels may satisfy DOE 10 CFR Part 431 numerical floors for some hp/pole combinations, but this must be independently verified through DOE-recognised testing. Nameplate fields, service factor declaration, hp rating, and design letter are typically absent from Chinese standard nameplates and must be added. Combined with the frame dimension gap (see motus-nema-01), full NEMA MG-1 compliance for a standard Chinese motor requires significant re-engineering, re-testing, and re-labelling.
compliance_verdict.zh: 未经额外措施最多部分合规。符合GB 18613 IE3/IE4效率等级的中国电机在部分马力/极数组合上可能满足DOE 10 CFR Part 431数值下限，但须通过DOE认可的独立测试验证。铭牌字段、服务系数声明、马力额定及设计字母通常不存在于中国标准铭牌，须补充添加。结合机座尺寸差距（见motus-nema-01），标准中国电机完全符合NEMA MG-1需大幅重新设计、重新测试和重新标识。
compliance_verdict.zht: 未經額外措施最多部分合規。符合GB 18613 IE3/IE4效率等級的中國電機在部分馬力/極數組合上可能滿足DOE 10 CFR Part 431數值下限，但須通過DOE認可的獨立測試驗證。銘牌欄位、服務係數聲明、馬力額定及設計字母通常不存在於中國標準銘牌，須補充添加。結合機座尺寸差距（見motus-nema-01），標準中國電機完全符合NEMA MG-1需大幅重新設計、重新測試和重新標識。
